title: Better Scythes 3D
description: This Changes The spears into better 3D Scythes ( 3D Spears )
body:
# **🔪 Better Scythes 3D**

**Turn your Diamond Spear into a deadly 3D scythe!**

Better Scythes 3D is a lightweight resource pack (or mod, if you're using it with mods) that reimagines the recently added Diamond Spear as a fully-modeled 3D scythe, perfect for players who want a more sinister or stylish look in their arsenal.


**🛠 Features:**

- ⚔️ Replaces the Diamond Spear with a high-quality 3D scythe model
- 
- 🧱 Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft and most mods that don't override the spear
- 
- 🎨 Textures designed to match Minecraft’s default art style
- 
- 🔄 Plug-and-play – no configs or setup required
- 
- ✅ Perfect For:

Grim reaper roleplays 😈

Custom survival or adventure maps

Players who want cooler weapons without adding new items
